title: Polymer clay faux opal cabochon
notes: A domed cabochon approximately 20 mm x 15 mm mimicking Ethiopian opal — translucent white base layered with foil confetti, iridescent glitter, and clear tinted polymer in pink/blue/green. Dome formed by pressing into a gemstone mould or by shaping freehand and smoothing. Sanded through 400-800-1000 grit, then buffed or varnished. Used as a ring top, pendant, or brooch centre.
